ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "base_type" TEXT /* Base type of the data (e.g., UINT, FLOAT) */,
  "primitive_type" TEXT /* Primitive type name (e.g., UInt, Float) */,
  "decode_interface" TEXT /* Interface used for decoding the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the data type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "base_types" (
  "base_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each base type */,
  "base_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the base type (e.g., UINT, FLOAT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the base type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the base type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the base type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the base type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the base type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the base type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("base_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "primitive_types" (
  "primitive_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primitive type */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data type */,
  "primitive_name" TEXT /* Name of the primitive type */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum allowable value for the primitive type */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum allowable value for the primitive type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the primitive type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the primitive type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the primitive type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the primitive type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the primitive type was last updated */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the primitive type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("primitive_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_primitive_types_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decode_interfaces" (
  "decode_interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decode interface */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the decode interface */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the decode interface */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the decode interface is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the decode interface */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the decode interface was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the decode interface */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the decode interface was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decode_interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_type_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data type */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data type */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_type_versions_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data architect, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the type */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log entry is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "source_data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source data type */,
  "target_data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target data type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reference is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reference was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the reference */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_references_source_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_references_target_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grouped_data_types" (
  "grouped_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grouping */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the grouping is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the grouping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the grouping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the grouping */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the grouping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grouped_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grouped_data_types_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grouped_data_types_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES type_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data type */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metadata entry is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the metadata entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the metadata entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the rule applies to */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the validation rule is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the validation rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the validation rule */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_validation_rules_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)
